question_text:
In commit a0f7cba on 2026-07-07, you wrote line 19 of gradebook/analytics.py:
19:     elif score >= 60:

Consider changing `score >= 60` to `score > 60`.

After changing `score >= 60` to `score > 60` in `letter_grade`, what observable grade-assignment behavior changes at the boundary between D and F, and why?
